seoTitle: Kelvin View vs Kenley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kelvin View and Kenley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kelvin View vs Kenley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kelvin View and Kenley.
heading: Kelvin View vs Kenley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kelvin View, Victoria and Kenley, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kelvin View has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Kenley (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kelvin View or Kenley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kelvin View has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Kenley scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kelvin View scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Kenley scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kelvin View or Kenley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kelvin View has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
